From December 22-December 27 2022 the [[Lifeism Wiki]] went offline due to database issues again. Afterwards it was restored to the state it was pre [[Great November Outage]]. It is currently in the process of being merged with the recreation during the outage which was hosted for the longest time on a separate wiki. Many pages have substantial edit histories from both periods that will require manual merges, while some like [[Nine Plagues]] had substantially better versions pre-outage and others like many plague articles (although not [[Entrapment]] articles) were substantially better post outage.

== Categories ==
https://archive.ph/wip/LY3SL

Need to make sure all these articles are still in [[:Category:John Vervaeke|Category:John Vervaeke]] after the merge

Same with [[:Category:Wikipedia|Category:Wikipedia]]
[[Category:Minor December Outage]]
[[Category:Great November Outage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
